# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: staging-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_9_6
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        authorizedNetworks:
        - value: 0.0.0.0/0
      userLabels:
        environment: staging
      databaseFlags:
        - name: cloudsql
          value: 'true'
      dataDiskSizeGb: '10'
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      locationPreference:
        zone: us-central1-a
      maintenanceWindow:
        hour: 1
        day: 1
        updateTrack: stable
      pricingPlan: PER_USE
      replicationType: SYNCHRONOUS
      activationPolicy: ALWAYS
      backupConfiguration:
        startTime: '00:00'
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: false
- name: root
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-database.name)
    name: root
    password: CloudSQL2024!
